title: Stonecutter Wood Recipes
description: Craft wood related recipes from wood and logs in the stonecutter
body:
Enables you to craft various wood-related blocks using a stonecutter for easier crafting and better inventory management. You can put either logs, stripped logs, wood, or stripped wood onto a stonecutter to break them down. Moreover, some of the recipes yield more blocks (i.e. trapdoors) for quality of life. Below are the recipes:

1 log/wood can be turned into:
  1 stripped log\
  1 wood/log\
  1 stripped wood\
  1 shelf\
  4 planks\
  8 stairs\
  8 slabs\
  8 trapdoors\
  3 doors\
  3 fences\
  4 fence gates\
  3 signs\
  4 buttons\
  4 pressure plates\
  *the stripped variants can be converted into the above blocks except back to their non-stripped variants
